alignment.description: Align reads to reference genome; mark duplicates (Picard/GATK MarkDuplicates)

base_recalibration.description: BQSR (base quality score recalibration) using known variant sites

data_acquisition.description: Acquire raw FASTQ files from repositories or local storage

spec_preferred_methods.geoparse_python_processed_matrices: GEO-only Python fallback (geoparse). Select only when every SME-named accession is a GSE and CNGB/NGDC/EGA sources are absent from the cohort. If a non-GEO accession is present, this method SHOULD NOT be top-ranked alone — it forces silent cohort truncation. Pair with a CNGB/NGDC helper or escalate to multi_repo_processed_matrices_python.
spec_preferred_methods.geoquery_r_processed_matrices: GEO-only R fallback (GEOquery / Bioconductor). Same scope caveat as geoparse_python_processed_matrices. Requires r_seurat=true or equivalent Bioconductor capability at runtime.
spec_preferred_methods.multi_repo_processed_matrices_python: Preferred: dispatch per-accession by prefix. GEO (GSE*) → GEOparse; SRA (SRP*/PRJNA*) → pysradb + prefetch; CNGB CNSA (CNP*) → HTTPS to ftp.cngb.org/pub/CNSA + scripts/helpers/cngb_fetch.py; NGDC GSA (CRA*/HRA* public) → ngdc.cncb.ac.cn download API. Union of processed matrices written to a single manifest. Keeps the "use published matrices, do not reprocess FASTQ" commitment while covering non-GEO public repos.
spec_preferred_methods.multi_repo_processed_matrices_r: R/Bioconductor equivalent — GEO via GEOquery, SRA via SRAdb, CNGB/NGDC via httr + a shared URL-resolver helper. Use only when env_capability shows r_seurat=true; otherwise prefer the Python multi_repo method.
spec_preferred_methods.sme_provided_direct_urls: SME supplies a TSV of {accession, direct_url, sha256} when repository APIs are unavailable or when a specific mirror is preferred. Agent downloads via curl/wget and verifies checksums.

discover_alignment.description: Discover alignment tool (BWA-MEM2, BWA-MEM, DRAGEN) and reference build

resolution.primary: Search literature and tool registries for best-practice method

discover_annotation.description: Discover annotation databases (Ensembl VEP, ANNOVAR, SnpEff) and sources

resolution.primary: Search literature and tool registries for best-practice method

discover_data_acquisition.description: Discover best-practice method for: Acquire raw FASTQ files from repositories or local storage

resolution.primary: Search literature and tool registries for best-practice method

discover_variant_caller.description: Discover variant caller (GATK HaplotypeCaller, DeepVariant, Mutect2 for somatic; DRAGEN-GATK as accelerated alternative when FPGA / Illumina DRAGEN hardware is available)

resolution.primary: Search literature and tool registries for best-practice method

discover_variant_filtering.description: Discover filtering strategy (VQSR, hard filters, CNN-based) and thresholds

resolution.primary: Search literature and tool registries for best-practice method

quality_control.description: Assess read quality with FastQC/MultiQC; flag low-quality samples

results_review.description: SME reviews variant callset, annotations, and prioritized candidates

trimming.description: Trim adapters (conditional on QC — often not needed for WGS/WES)

validate_alignment.description: Validate alignment metrics (coverage, duplication rate, on-target rate for WES)

validate_base_recalibration.description: Validate outputs of: BQSR (base quality score recalibration) using known variant sites

validate_quality_control.description: Validate outputs of: Assess read quality with FastQC/MultiQC; flag low-quality samples

validate_trimming.description: Validate outputs of: Trim adapters (conditional on QC — often not needed for WGS/WES)

validate_variant_annotation.description: Validate outputs of: Annotate variants with functional effects, population frequency, pathogenicity

validate_variant_calling.description: Validate outputs of: Call SNPs, indels (and SVs if applicable) from aligned BAM files

validate_variant_calls.description: Validate call set quality (Ti/Tv ratio, dbSNP concordance, coverage at sites)

validate_variant_filtering.description: Validate outputs of: Apply variant quality filters to reduce false positives

variant_annotation.description: Annotate variants with functional effects, population frequency, pathogenicity

variant_calling.description: Call SNPs, indels (and SVs if applicable) from aligned BAM files

variant_filtering.description: Apply variant quality filters to reduce false positives
